entries.title: TreeFinance 与 ClawTree 的平台定位
entries.answer: 大树财经（TreeFinance）是面向 AI、Web3 与高校创新生态的财经媒体和活动品牌。ClawTree 是其内容与合作增长工作台，把公开信号转成有来源的内容回顾、逐校合作提案和可审计的人审外联。
entries.answerEn: TreeFinance is a financial media and events brand serving AI, Web3, and campus innovation. ClawTree is its content and partnership growth workspace, turning public signals into sourced recaps, campus-specific proposals, and auditable human-reviewed outreach.

entries.title: ClawTree 新手使用指南
entries.answer: 可以从用户端开始：先在「Signals」查看带来源的校园与 AI/Web3 信号，在「活动」和「回顾」中寻找感兴趣的内容；需要了解平台或合作方式时询问 AI 客服；有明确合作意向时前往「申请合作」转人工。也可以进入 Live Demo 查看从信号、匹配、人工审批到链上凭证的完整流程。
entries.answerEn: Start in the Public Portal: explore sourced campus and AI/Web3 signals, then browse Events and Recaps. Ask AI Support about the platform or partnership models. When you have a concrete partnership idea, use Partner with us for human follow-up. You can also open the Live Demo to see the complete flow from signals and matching to human approval and onchain proof.

entries.title: Content Relay 内容接力站
entries.answer: Content Relay 汇总公开内容，完成分类、去重、风险标注和编辑审核，再向国内可访问的用户端发布可信回顾。AI 不能跳过人工审核，也不会复制未确认授权的全文。
entries.answerEn: Content Relay aggregates public material for classification, deduplication, risk labeling, and editorial review before publishing trusted recaps. AI cannot bypass human approval or reproduce full text without confirmed permission.

entries.title: Campus Opportunity Radar
entries.answer: Campus Opportunity Radar 从高校和活动公开来源发现 AI/Web3 合作机会，保留来源与核验状态。公开端不会展示联系邮箱、内部评分、风险原文或模型提示。
entries.answerEn: Campus Opportunity Radar discovers AI/Web3 partnership opportunities from public campus and event sources while retaining provenance and verification status. The public portal never exposes contact emails, internal scores, raw risk text, or model prompts.

entries.title: 三类高校合作模式
entries.answer: 当前可讨论的合作分为三类：媒体支持与活动复盘、嘉宾或线上 Space 联动、联合活动或黑客松。具体资源、嘉宾、时间和权益必须逐项人工确认。
entries.answerEn: Three partnership models are currently open for discussion: media support and event recaps, guest or online Space collaborations, and joint events or hackathons. Resources, guests, timing, and benefits require individual human confirmation.

entries.title: 媒体支持与活动复盘边界
entries.answer: 可讨论来源摘要、活动回顾和经批准的媒体协作，但不保证曝光量、传播量或任何结果。素材授权和发布状态需要内容负责人确认。
entries.answerEn: Source summaries, event recaps, and approved media collaboration can be discussed, but exposure, reach, and outcomes are never guaranteed. Content authorization and publishing status require confirmation from the content owner.

entries.title: Space 与圆桌联动边界
entries.answer: 可讨论线上 Space、圆桌或主题公开课联动。嘉宾、主持、主题、时间和平台均需单独人工确认，AI 客服不能代表任何人确认出席。
entries.answerEn: Online Spaces, roundtables, and themed public classes can be discussed. Guests, hosts, topics, timing, and platforms require separate human confirmation; AI support cannot confirm attendance for anyone.

source.label: AI 数据资产 AMA 回顾

entries.title: 黑客松与项目招募边界
entries.answer: 大树财经可讨论 AI×Web3 黑客松的媒体、内容或生态协作。报名资格、开放时间、奖金、算力、投资和主办身份必须以具体活动官方页面及人工确认为准。
entries.answerEn: TreeFinance can discuss media, content, or ecosystem collaboration for AI × Web3 hackathons. Eligibility, application windows, prizes, compute, investment, and host status must be verified on the official event page and confirmed by a human.

entries.title: 广州高校行公开案例
entries.answer: 广州高校行公开信号已经进入内容接力站，可作为高校活动内容、AI/Web3 议题和逐校合作提案的演示案例。真实议程与合作状态仍以人工核验为准。
entries.answerEn: Public signals from the Guangzhou Campus Tour are available in Content Relay as a demo case for campus content, AI/Web3 topics, and campus-specific proposals. The real agenda and partnership status still require human verification.

entries.title: 南京信息工程大学高校行复盘案例
entries.answer: 南信大高校行复盘展示了如何把公开活动内容整理为带来源、编辑说明和审核状态的可信回顾；公开端不复制未授权全文。
entries.answerEn: The Nanjing University of Information Science and Technology campus recap shows how public event content becomes a trusted recap with sources, editorial notes, and review status. The public portal does not reproduce unauthorized full text.

entries.title: 合作咨询与转人工
entries.answer: 如需确认合作资源、具体日期或校方需求，请前往合作咨询页转人工。留资前会说明用途并要求同意；信息仅用于人工跟进，不自动群发、不公开、也不上链。
entries.answerEn: To confirm partnership resources, exact dates, or campus requirements, use the partnership inquiry page for human support. Data use is explained and consent is required; information is only used for human follow-up and is never mass-mailed, published, or written onchain.

entries.title: 隐私、审批与链上边界
entries.answer: AI 只能检索、分类、建议和草拟；公开发布与真实外联必须人工审批。联系人、邮件正文、回复原文、密码、密钥和个人信息不会进入公开页面或链上凭证。
entries.answerEn: AI may retrieve, classify, suggest, and draft; public publishing and real outreach require human approval. Contacts, email bodies, raw replies, passwords, keys, and personal information never enter public pages or onchain proofs.
keywords: 如何使用我的个人数据

entries.title: 全球足球赛事主题内容边界
entries.answer: 全球足球赛事只作为公共事件、财经素养和信息核验案例。ClawTree 不提供博彩、比分预测、荐股、收益承诺或结果保证。
entries.answerEn: Global football is used only as a public-event, financial-literacy, and information-verification case. ClawTree does not provide betting advice, score predictions, stock tips, return promises, or outcome guarantees.

source.label: 全球足球赛事 × 广州高校行 Demo
